name: Shadow Bonds – Persona Crossover
description:
# ✨ Shadow Bonds – Persona Crossover ✨

“Nine souls. Two worlds. One fate.”

🌧️ A rainy night in Inaba. A flickering TV.

Nine girls. Two teams. Shadows watching you.

Who will you find? Who will you trust?

## 👥 Meet the Nine

Ann Takamaki – the flame in the rain 🔥

Blonde, passionate, bright – but can you see the doubt behind her smile?

---

Makoto Niijima – the iron fist ✊

Sharp eyes, steady stance – a leader who won’t trust easily.

---

Futaba Sakura – the voice in the shadows 👓

Glasses, hoodie, flickering grin – genius yet vulnerable.

---

Haru Okumura – the rose with thorns 🌹

Gentle and elegant – but strength hides in her calm gaze.

---

Kasumi Yoshizawa – the new hope 🎀

Energetic, hopeful – but how deep do her shadows run?

---

Chie Satonaka – the unshakable fist 🥋

Energetic and loyal – but jealousy lurks behind her grin.

---

Yukiko Amagi – the smile that breaks 🌸

Quiet, elegant, always laughing – sometimes to hide her fear.

---

Rise Kujikawa – the idol in the fog 🎤

Playful, flirty, always shining – but what if the spotlight fades?

---

Naoto Shirogane – the cold eye 🔎

Analytical, serious, unshakable – or does warmth hide beneath?

----

🌫️ Step into the channel.

Forge bonds, uncover secrets, and face the shadows.

🎭 Every choice is a bond.

🔥 Every bond has a price.

Who will you save... and who will you lose in the fog?
creator: God of Darkness
